text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Okay, where should I buy my groceries
today?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, the grocer near the station is doing a
super sale on carrots.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I don't know, though. They'll probably have
another sale at some point...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'll just stick with a local place today. I don't feel
like walking too far...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Ines Fujin is pretty fatigued from her
back-to-back races. Revising her race schedule
might be a good idea.
